data.name: 竹内 優輝 （Masaki Takeuchi）
data.belong: 名古屋大学 理学部 生命理学科

history.title: 海月との歩み
paragraphs: 小学生の頃、母親に買ってもらった危険生物の図鑑でクラゲに興味を持つ
中学ではいつの間にかアイデンティティへ
高校の時に所属していた自然科学部で研究を始める

programming.title: プログラミングとの出会い
paragraphs: 割と昔から興味と憧れだけはあった。
高校生の頃、研究のためPythonを学習
そこから開発にのめりこむ
根性があればなんでも作れると思っている

history.title: Journey with Jellyfish
paragraphs: Became interested in jellyfish when my mother bought me an encyclopedia of dangerous creatures in elementary school.
In middle school, it naturally became part of my identity.
Started researching jellyfish in the natural science club during high school.
And that brings me to the present...

programming.title: Encounter with Programming
paragraphs: I've always had an interest and admiration for it.
Learned Python for research purposes in high school.
Became deeply engrossed in development from then on.
I believe you can build anything as long as you have the dedication.
